metadata.title: Look Nae Further - Scottish Betis Supporters Club
metadata.description: The Real Betis supporters club in Edinburgh, Scotland. Over 15 years sharing the Betis passion at the Polwarth Tavern. Events, RSVP, gallery and family community.

layout.footerAbout: The Real Betis supporters club in Edinburgh. Over 15 years sharing the Betis passion in Scotland.

home.descriptionPart1: Over 15 years sharing the Betis passion frae Edinburgh. Here ye'll find true pals, unforgettable moments, and the warmth of a community that welcomes ye like family.
home.descriptionPart2: Whether ye're frae Seville, anywhere in Spain, or even a Scot... if ye carry Betis in yer heart, ye're already one of us.
home.familyDesc: Bairns welcome, relaxed and cosy atmosphere
home.humorDesc: Win or lose, we have a good time and enjoy ourselves
home.nextMatchDesc: Join the supporters club for the next Betis match
home.visitingSubtitle: Come watch the matches wi' us!
home.visitingDesc: All Béticos are welcome. It disnae matter where ye're frae, here ye have a family that shares yer passion for Betis.
home.scheduleDetails:
15 min before kick-off
All events
Football · Gatherings · Celebrations

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: More than a supporters club, we're a family
about.originsText1: - Juan Morata and José María Conde bumped intae each other playing football in Edinburgh. Both were wearing the Betis shirt.
about.originsText2: That chance meeting was the start of a great Bético friendship and the first official Real Betis supporters club in the UK.
about.originsQuote: "The idea came over a pint in a pub. They just decided there and then."
about.familyText1: Since 2010, we've welcomed Béticos frae all over Spain living in Scotland, exchange students, tourists passing through... everyone's welcome.
about.familyText2: We've celebrated promotions, titles and unforgettable moments together. We've also shed tears over defeats and consoled ourselves with the certainty that "next year will be ours".
about.familyRecognition: Recognised by LaLiga as a "bastion" of Betis support in Scotland
about.legacy2010: First official Betis supporters club in the UK
about.legacy2015: New home at the Polwarth Tavern
about.legacyClosing: Every Bético who joins adds another chapter tae our story
about.ctaTitle: Want tae be part of our story?
about.ctaText: Yer story can become part of ours too.

join.title: Join Us
join.subtitle: Three things ye need tae know
join.step2Text: Follow us tae stay up tae date on matches, plans and photos frae the club.
join.step3Closing: Just turn up, say ye're a Bético and ye're one of us.
join.visitingText: Tourists, students, temporary workers... if ye're a Bético and ye're in Edinburgh, this is yer place. We love meeting Béticos frae all over Spain and making them feel right at home.
join.ctaText: The next match could be the perfect time tae meet us.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a question? We're here tae help
contact.formDescription: Fill in the form and we'll get back tae ye soon
contact.successMessage: We'll get back tae ye soon.
contact.errorMessage: Error sending the message. Please try again.
contact.autoFilled: Yer details have been filled in automatically
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us in detail what ye need...
contact.whatsappNote: 📱 WhatsApp request: Include yer mobile number in the message so we can add ye tae the group. The group is used for schedule changes and special events.
contact.photoNote: 📸 Photo submission: Ye can attach photos directly in the gallery or send them by email. Let us know if ye'd like them posted on social media.
contact.faq1Question: How can I join the club?
contact.faq1Answer: Simply come tae The Polwarth Tavern any day Betis are playing. Ye dinnae need tae be a member, just bring yer enthusiasm.
contact.faq2Answer: It's nae required, but it helps us reserve a table. Use the RSVP form if ye know ye're coming.
contact.faq3Answer: Of course! The more the merrier. Just mention how many ye're bringing in the RSVP.
contact.faq4Answer: Aye, use the online gallery or drop us a line. We love seeing photos of Béticos cheering on Betis.
contact.faq5Answer: Aye, use this tae request an invite. We'll add ye for important updates and event coordination.
contact.otherContactTitle: Other ways tae get in touch
contact.pageDisabled: The contact page is currently disabled.
contact.typeWhatsappDesc: Request an invite tae the WhatsApp group
contact.typeFeedbackDesc: Improvements and feedback about the website

rsvp.heroSubtitle: Confirm yer attendance for the next match
rsvp.reserveDesc: Wi' yer confirmation, we can reserve a big table so we're all together watching the match.
rsvp.punctualDesc: We know how many are coming and can let ye know if ye need tae arrive early for big matches.
rsvp.atmosphereDesc: The more of us there are, the better the atmosphere. Yer presence makes the experience more special for everyone.
rsvp.orgDetails3: 🌐 Social media: Follow us on our channels

matches.title: Matches
matches.confirmForMatch: Confirm yer attendance tae watch the match wi' the club
